palette_hint: Off-white background #F5F2EC, near-black text #1A1814, acid-yellow accent #D4E04A, rust-red accent #C4421A, and cool slate #4A5568 for secondary UI elements.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif at heavy weight (700) for gravitas; body in system-ui/Helvetica Neue at 400/500; monospace Courier New for data labels and marginalia; six distinct sizes from 11px captions to 88px display numerals; overall feel is rigorous European print journal.
description: Forma Negra Review is a biannual critical design journal covering graphic systems, spatial typography, and material culture, presented as a dense multi-module web edition with the visual weight of a printed broadsheet.
constraints: Global spacing token: base unit 8px, all padding/margin in multiples of 8; max content width 1440px with a 24px outer gutter; inner column gutter always 32px.
Color tokens strictly enforced: --bg #F5F2EC, --ink #1A1814, --yellow #D4E04A, --rust #C4421A, --slate #4A5568, --rule #C8C4BB; no other colors except tints of these at 20% or 80% opacity.

Every page must contain at minimum: one full-bleed hero module, one multi-column longform body section (3 columns on desktop), one sidebar panel with sticky positioning, one data or stat callout block, one pull quote in oversized type, and one SVG decorative accent element.
Typography hierarchy enforced sitewide: display 88px/1.0, h1 52px/1.05, h2 36px/1.1, h3 24px/1.2, body 17px/1.65, caption 12px/1.4, mono-label 11px/1.3; all in the defined font stack only.

Each page footer block must include a 5-column issue index strip with ruled borders at 1px solid #C8C4BB, article counts per section rendered as two-digit monospace numerals, and the Forma Negra logotype in 11px all-caps tracking 0.25em.

page_specs.cover: The cover page opens with a full-viewport hero divided diagonally: left two-thirds is #1A1814 ink-black with the issue title 'Vol. 12 — The Friction Issue' set at 88px Georgia bold in #F5F2EC, right third is acid-yellow #D4E04A bearing a large inline SVG of an abstract letterform grid. Below the hero, a 4-column module grid previews six featured articles as card tiles with rust-red category labels, each tile showing headline, author byline, and a 3-digit page number in 48px monospace. A horizontal timeline strip spanning full width lists the issue's 14 contributors as a scrollable marquee-style static row with dot separators, followed by a masthead data block listing editorial roles in a two-column definition list with slate-colored keys and ink values.
page_specs.feature: The feature page presents the lead essay 'Against Smooth Surfaces: Texture as Argument in Post-Digital Graphic Design' across a three-column body with a 280px sticky sidebar on the right. The first paragraph uses a 4-line drop cap in rust-red #C4421A at 72px. The sidebar contains: a marginalia column with 6 numbered annotations in 11px Courier New, a stat card cluster showing three data points (47% of surveyed studios, 12 major exhibitions, 1993 origin year) styled as large numeral callouts over thin ruled boxes, and a related-articles list with arrow bullets in yellow. Two pull quotes interrupt the body columns at asymmetric positions, set at 36px Georgia italic in #4A5568 with a 4px left border in rust. The page includes a full-bleed image caption strip mid-article showing a 6-cell figure-caption grid with captions in 12px italic, and inline SVG ruled dividers between sections.
page_specs.critique: The critique page hosts three short critical reviews side by side in an asymmetric grid: columns at 38%, 28%, and 26% width with 32px gutters and the remaining space as a 8% bleed margin. Each review opens with a 36px bold headline, a byline badge in a yellow pill shape, and a 5-star rating system rendered as inline SVG stars filled in rust or slate. The page's hero is a typographic lockup: the word 'CRITIQUE' letterpress-style at 88px with a 2px stroke outline and no fill against the off-white background. A data table below the reviews compares 9 design objects across 6 criteria (materiality, legibility, cultural context, production ethics, novelty, longevity) using a grid of colored cells — yellow for high, slate for mid, rust for low — with monospace values 0–10. A footnote zone at the bottom uses a 2-column layout in 11px Courier New with horizontal rules every 24px.
page_specs.typographica: The typographica page is a deep-dive reference on three typefaces: Akzidenz-Grotesk, Plantin, and Eurostile. Each typeface gets a full-width specimen band showing the alphabet at 52px, a pangram at 24px, and numeral set at 36px, all in that face's closest system substitute. Below each band, a 4-column specification table lists: designer, year, classification, optical size range, and recommended pairing — 5 rows × 5 columns with alternating #F5F2EC and #ECEAE3 row fills. A sidebar fixed to the left at 200px wide lists a glossary of 18 typographic terms in 12px monospace with rust-colored term labels. The page hero is a single large display numeral '3' at 240px Georgia in #D4E04A on ink background, annotated with 7 SVG callout lines pointing to typographic anatomy landmarks (cap height, x-height, descender, serif bracket, counter, stem, ink trap). A pull quote from Jan Tschichold at 36px closes the body.
page_specs.archive: The archive page is a dense catalog of all 12 volumes of Forma Negra Review, laid out as a structured data table with 12 rows and 8 columns: Volume, Year, Theme, Lead Essay, Cover Designer, Page Count, Print Run, and Digital Views. Rows alternate background between #F5F2EC and #ECEAE3; the current volume row is highlighted with a 2px left border in rust and yellow background tint at 20% opacity. Above the table, a hero module shows a 6×2 grid of cover thumbnails represented as styled div blocks with volume number overlays in large monospace type. A timeline strip beneath the hero uses an SVG horizontal line with 12 circular nodes, each labeled with year and theme title in 11px Courier New at 45-degree rotation. A right sidebar (240px) displays subscription statistics: three stat cards (42,000 print subscribers, 180 countries reached, 97% renewal rate) and a mini bar chart rendered in pure CSS using div heights. The footer block on this page doubles as a full issue index with all 14 sections listed in two columns with article counts.
